_meta.muc_dich: Kho nguyen lieu Story DNA - App random gan cho moi bai de chong trung. AI chi ke chuyen theo to hop duoc gan.
_meta.ghi_chu: Ten chon theo the he sinh 1950-1970 (dung tuoi nhan vat 55-75). Sau lam nuoc khac thi thay pool nay.

nghe_bi_mat: former teacher of a famous person
former nurse in a MASH unit
the person who paid their tuition
former business owner who went broke helping family
the one who built the family fortune
